name: Chocolate-Butterscotch Brownies
recipeIngredient: 2 packages butterscotch pudding mix, 3-5/8 oz each
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt.
2. Beat the eggs in a large bowl until very thick. Add the sifted dry ingredients and the rest of the ingredients; mix well with a whisk. Do not use an electric mixer.
3. Fold in the chocolate chips.
4. Pour the batter into a lightly greased 9 x 9 x 2 inch pan.
5. Bake in a preheated oven at 325 degrees Fahrenheit for 35 to 40 minutes, or until a cake tester inserted in the center comes out clean.
6. Let the pan cool on a wire rack before cutting into bars.
Yield: about 2 dozen bars.
